void Api_SetVoltage(long nCameraId) {
    double a[] = { 25.84265561469557, 25.877529300272613, 25.83974238608334, 26.022127508762814 };
    double b[] = { -2.028035181098278, -2.0136252109567647, -2.058751135921072, -2.1350960664676104 };
    unsigned short cwl[10] = { 713,736,759,782,805,828,851,874,897,920 };
    double v[][4] = {
        {34.66983515784948,46.251168391253515,45.693694253915226,34.11236102051119},
        {37.04740870486942,47.88113214111869,47.35275936235747,36.519035926108195},
        {39.015830290855995,49.25336909855361,48.74820332258938,38.510664514891765},
        {40.973475074185075,50.637255832661694,50.154424085478794,40.490643327002175},
        {42.532359603048945,51.75218228843285,51.28663199358971,42.066809308205805},
        {44.08521046884917,52.873631163649435,52.42487356476428,43.63645286996402},
        {45.632359595340894,54.00124364709968,53.56881687524734,45.19993282348856},
        {46.78916423188266,54.85079836938325,54.43033156643667,46.36869742893608},
        {48.3270554020339,55.988418749168254,55.583532833260215,47.92216948612586},
        {49.86002832976791,57.13135577319425,56.741652342501006,49.47032489907466}
    };
    for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
        UnsLutInfo info;
        int res = GetLUTLine(nCameraId, cwl[i], info);
        double line[4] = { 0 };
        for (int j = 0; j < 4; j++) {
            line[j] = ST_MEMS2DAC(v[i][j], a[j], b[j]);
        }
        SetLUTLine(nCameraId, cwl[i], line, info.fps, info.gain);

    }


}
